prompt:
A laptop on a developer’s desk displaying a stylized DSPACE project page on the left and a GitHub-style repository card on the right, connected by a glowing link icon between them. The repository card shows a simple folder icon, branch icon, and a few colored bars representing commits and activity, all without readable text or exact GitHub branding. On the desk are a notebook with sketched diagrams, a mug, and a small plant, suggesting an active development workflow.

Near-future solarpunk workspace aesthetic with warm lighting, wooden surfaces, and maybe a tiny solar panel gadget in the background. Photorealistic 512×512 rendering with no real logos or legible UI text. The composition should clearly convey the concept of a remote Git repository hosted on GitHub as an inventory item.
